model.name: IVD NP Cell Signaling Regulatory Network Model (Enriched)

body.h1: IVD NP Cell Signaling Regulatory Network Model
body.p: A Network-Based Approach to Understanding Key Signaling Pathways in Intervertebral Disc Biology.
Network: 85 proteins, 138 activation edges, 53 inhibition edges.

Mathematical framework: Semi-quantitative Mendoza ODE system (Mendoza & Xenarios, 2006). Each species rate rule encodes dx/dt = sigmoid(omega; h=10) - gamma*x, where omega aggregates all upstream activator and inhibitor inputs.
Parameters: h=10 (sigmoid steepness), gamma=1 (decay), alpha=beta=1 (uniform interaction weights).
